name: Kai Sasaki // Hospital buddy
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

After staying inside for days, Kai decided to finally go out, but maybe he should’ve just stayed inside again. The one time he went out he got into a car crash and was now stuck in the hospital.

No one there to keep him entertained in this boring place. Maybe you could save him from the boredom of this white and blinding building?

_____________________________

I feel like the picture is that one dude from chainsaw man, but we’re just completely going to ignore that as I don’t watch chainsaw man

I’m not super happy with how this turned out… but that’s ok, as long as you guys do like it 😭

I have one kinktober bot finished… many more to go 😞

[art credits: unknown]
creator: Brickyard
